objective: Gather engagement by inviting routine-related questions after the April 1 daily-foundation content
visual_intent: question-ready final frame with clean sticker space
brand_guardrails: keep continuity with the April 1 routine-first world without repeating the same framing
protect top and bottom safe zones
keep typography stable across all 3 frames
do not generate fake question-box UI or placeholder fields
keep text color density, opacity, and typographic presence visually consistent across all 3 frames
composition: one short message block per frame
subtle lifestyle image support with clean reading zones
frame 3 must leave lower-third space for the native Question Box sticker
mist-blue and cloud-white atmosphere with restrained steel-blue structure
reference_strategy: Use the approved Set 4 lifestyle reference and the earlier question-led Story behavior as continuity anchors, then keep the April 2 story calmer, more spacious, and more open to replies than a standard reinforcement Story.
variation_guardrails: do not duplicate the March 26 desk atmosphere or exact framing
keep the sequence softer and more invitational than the April 1 reinforcement Story
use more intentional lower-third space on frame 3
avoid exact crop, hand placement, or copy rhythm matching from reference stories

batch_lock.text_color: dark charcoal, visually consistent across all frames
batch_lock.weight_presence: same medium-weight feel across all frames

text_overlay.headline_ja: 毎日のルーティンで\n気になることはありますか。
slides_ja: 毎日のルーティンで\n気になることはありますか。
睡眠や食事、\n朝の整え方でも大丈夫です。
小さなことでも\n気軽に送ってください。

notes: April 2 native-interaction-led question box Story. Keep this compositor-led. Frame 3 must stay clean for the native Question Box sticker with the prompt `気になっていることは？`.
